news.summary: The rise in the number of loans with deferred pay-later options has caused concern, especially as the Trump administration aims to severely reduce funding for the agency responsible for regulating this industry.
news.headline: Rise in pay-later defaults signals consumer behavior shift amid Trump admin's push to weaken loan oversight.
US Agriculture Sec. Rollins: Heading to Italy next week, then India, Vietnam, and Japan

news.summary: A real estate company based in Calgary, Alberta known as Mainstreet Equity Corp. has made a significant announcement. The Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX) has approved their proposal to commence a normal course issuer bid. This bid allows Mainstreet to buy back an impressive 475,359 of their outstanding common shares on the open market. This number represents approximately 10% of all Shares available. Mainstreet, listed as (TSX:MEQ), is set to undertake this buyback in accordance with TSX regulations.
news.headline: Mainstreet Equity Corp. to buy back 475,359 shares under normal course issuer bid on TSX, approx. 10% of total shares.

news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on May 30, 2025, Black Diamond Group Limited, a prominent provider of space rental and temporary lodging (TSX: BDI, OTCQX:BDIMF), released its 2025 Corporate Responsibility Report. This Report focuses on the company's dedication to environmental, social, and governance concerns. It emphasizes the beneficial outcomes and value generated through collaborative initiatives by the company.
news.headline: Black Diamond releases 2025 Corporate Responsibility Report emphasizing commitment to ESG, social causes, and positive impact.

news.summary: In Baltimore, at the 73rd Conference on Mass Spectrometry and Allied Topics (ASMS), Bruker Corporation (Nasdaq: BRKR) introduced the timsMetabo, a cutting-edge 4D-Metabolomics™ mass spectrometer. This groundbreaking device offers exceptional sensitivity, separation capability, and confidence in molecule annotation for small molecules. It includes the innovative TIMS ‘MoRE’ scan-mode for enhanced performance. The timsMetabo system allows for the creation of a ‘digital metabolome archive’ for each sample, significantly improving TIMS-enabled qualitative and quantitative analysis.
news.headline: Bruker launches timsMetabo Mass Spectrometer at ASMS, providing breakthrough sensitivity and annotation confidence for metabolomics.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts, ConcertAI has introduced its innovative Precision Suite™, a collection of AI-driven solutions tailored for oncology. These cutting-edge tools revolutionize the process for life sciences and healthcare firms to obtain valuable insights, enhance clinical trials, expedite market implementation, and enhance patient results – all while reducing costs by millions. The Precision Suite™ harnesses the power of ConcertAI's exclusive CARAai™ platform and sets a new standard in the industry.
news.headline: ConcertAI launches Precision Suite™ for oncology insights, actions. AI solutions optimize trials, save costs, improve outcomes. Powered by CARAai™.

news.summary: A nonprofit organization based in Englewood, Colorado, announced on May 30, 2025, that they are open for registrations for their upcoming October conference. Women in HVACR (WHVACR) is focused on supporting women in the heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration industries. The organization is actively seeking participants for their conference.
news.headline: Women in HVACR hosting annual convention in Las Vegas. Accepting registrations for October conference. ENGLEWOOD, Colo., May 30, 2025 /PRNewswire.

news.headline: AT&T to release Q2 2025 earnings on July 23, webcast conference call to discuss results. Key info for investors.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, mF International Limited, a financial trading solution provider based in Hong Kong, revealed the outcomes of its yearly shareholder meeting held in Hong Kong. Operating under the Nasdaq symbol MFI, the Company shared key information with its stakeholders.
news.headline: mF International Limited (Nasdaq: MFI) reports results of annual general meeting in Hong Kong on May 30, 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on May 30, 2025, Wesco International, a prominent company specializing in B2B distribution, logistics services, and supply chain solutions, announced that they have been certified by Great Place To Work for the second consecutive year. This esteemed recognition is founded on the company's dedication to creating a positive and inclusive workplace environment. Wesco International, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WCC, continues to prioritize employee satisfaction and well-being, further solidifying their commitment to excellence in the industry.
news.headline: Wesco International (WCC) earns Great Place To Work Certification™ for the second consecutive year in 2025.

news.summary: During the pilot phase, 4 out of 11 patients with pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (PDAC) remained without progression for over one year. A poster presentation is scheduled for Saturday, May 31st in Tel Aviv, Israel. BioLineRx Ltd., a biopharmaceutical company listed on NASDAQ/TASE under the ticker BLRX, is leading this effort to develop groundbreaking treatments.
news.headline: BioLineRx to present promising data at ASCO 2025; 4 of 11 PDAC patients in trial remain progression-free after 1 year.

news.summary: On May 30th, 2025, Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. (Nasdaq: SCNI) announced its dedication to developing unique biological drug candidates for addressing inflammation and immunology (I&I) related diseases. The company aims to utilize its expertise in this area to create groundbreaking treatments.
news.headline: Scinai's Q1 2025 results show strong CDMO revenue growth and reduced cash burn. $SCNI on Nasdaq.

news.summary: In Rehovot, Israel, on May 30, 2025, CollPlant Biotechnologies, listed on NASDAQ as CLGN, announced its focus on regenerative and aesthetics medicine. The company is known for its pioneering technologies and products using non-animal-derived rhCollagen for tissue regeneration and medical aesthetics.
news.headline: CollPlant Biotechnologies announces $3.6 million direct offering on NASDAQ, focuses on regenerative and aesthetics medicine.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in New York, Burford Capital Limited, a prominent global finance and asset management company specializing in law, revealed the pound sterling conversion rate for its shareholder-endorsed final dividend for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2024, which stands at 6.25 US cents per share.
news.headline: Burford Capital announces pound sterling conversion rate for final dividend of 6.25 US cents per share.

news.summary: Canopy Growth Corporation, a leading cannabis company, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending March 31, 2025. The company, listed on both TSX (WEED) and Nasdaq (CGC), shared updates on its Form 10-K filing for FY2025, presenting audited consolidated financial statements and an independent auditor's unqualified report. The disclosed information pertains to a critical period for the industry, with significant insights into Canopy Growth's financial health and market position.
news.headline: Canopy Growth releases Q4 FY2025 financial results & FY2025, files 10-K, includes audited financial statements.

news.summary: In Costa Mesa, California on May 30, 2025, Vision Miner highlighted its position as a top provider of additive manufacturing (AM) solutions. The company offers businesses a wide range of 3D-printing technologies, advanced materials, and nearly ten years of expertise in the AM field.
news.headline: Vision Miner in Costa Mesa, CA, is a top additive manufacturing solution provider with expertise in 3D printing, materials, and 10 years of experience.

news.summary: In WOODCREEK, Texas, Aqua Texas revealed plans for two projects to enhance water conservation efforts in the area. These projects involve the implementation of Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI), a cutting-edge digital meter system. With AMI, customers can monitor their water consumption in almost real-time through various devices such as smartphones, tablets, and computers. Additionally, customers have the option to receive alerts upon reaching set limits, aiding in the prompt detection of possible leaks. This initiative seeks to minimize water loss and promote efficient water usage.
news.headline: Aqua Texas introduces high-tech solution for water conservation with Advanced Metering Infrastructure (AMI) to track usage in real-time.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc., a leading global medical technology company, headquartered in Warsaw, Indiana, shared news regarding its financial decision. The Board of Directors at Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: ZBH, SIX: ZBH) has given the green light for a quarterly cash dividend for the second quarter of 2025. This dividend payment will benefit the company's stockholders, demonstrating a commitment to providing returns.
news.headline: Zimmer Biomet (ZBH) to pay quarterly dividend for Q2 2025. Board approves cash dividend for stockholders.

news.summary: In Toronto, Silver Storm Mining Ltd. (TSX.V: SVRS | FSE: SVR) has disclosed a positive development regarding their recent capital raise. Due to significant investor interest, the Company, along with lead agent Red Cloud Securities Inc. and co-agent Ventum Financial Corp., have decided to augment the size of their marketed offering. The best-efforts private placement, initially set at gross proceeds of up to C$8,008,000, has now been expanded further due to strong demand.
news.headline: Silver Storm increases private placement to C$10.0 million, with Eric Sprott's participation, due to high investor demand.

news.summary: Labcorp, a leading global company in innovative medical services, has introduced new testing options that focus on solid tumors and hematologic malignancies. These updated offerings aim to provide more effective diagnostics for a wider range of patients. In addition, Labcorp is expanding its biopharmaceutical services to facilitate quicker clinical trials and the development of companion diagnostics. The company's efforts are designed to enhance the efficiency and accuracy of medical testing, benefiting both patients and healthcare providers. The developments were announced on May 30, 2025, and Labcorp's stock is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol LH.
news.headline: Labcorp expands oncology portfolio with new test offerings targeting solid tumors and hematologic malignancies.

news.summary: Chelmsford, Massachusetts - The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc. (CBST) (OTCQB: CBSTF) has announced the completion of its court-approved plan of arrangement under Section 192 of the Canada Business Corporations Act. The Company, known for its expertise in cultivating, manufacturing, and retailing cannabis products in the United States, finalized the Arrangement involving The Cannabist Company.
news.headline: The Cannabist Company (Cboe CA: CBST) completes plan of arrangement under Section 192 of Canada Business Corporations Act.

news.summary: Jason Hart, Chief Executive Officer of ALDI U.S., has been promoted to oversee global operations for the retailer, while David McGrath will assume Hart's previous role overseeing America's fastest-growing grocer. The announcement was made on May 30, 2025, by ALDI U.S. in Batavia, Illinois. This move signifies a significant change in leadership for the company, as Hart transitions to a more expansive role.
news.headline: ALDI U.S. CEO Jason Hart named Global COO of ALDI South Group; Atty McGrath promoted to ALDI U.S. CEO. May 30, 2025.

news.summary: Modine, a renowned company specializing in thermal management technology and solutions, has recently expanded its HVAC offerings by acquiring a new company. This strategic move will bring portable and agriculture heating solutions into Modine's product portfolio. The acquisition was finalized on May 30, 2025. Modine, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol MOD, is a global leader in the industry. This acquisition will help the company broaden its range of solutions and cater to a wider market.
news.headline: Modine buys L.B. White for heating solutions expansion, diversifying HVAC offerings; deal announced on May 30, 2025.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in London, Corero Network Security (AIM: CNS) (OTCQX: DDOSF) revealed a significant development in its collaboration with Lightedge, a prominent secure hybrid infrastructure provider. The partnership expansion is valued at $1.2 million, aimed at supplanting a current competitor and broadening their cooperation. This update signifies a notable advancement in the growth and security initiatives of both companies.
news.headline: Lightedge's DDoS protection scales globally with $1.2M Corero Network Security expansion, replaces competitor.

news.summary: Released on Spotify, "No Lip Service" debuts in tandem with S'ABLE Labs' inaugural lip product, showcasing a pioneering fusion of music and beauty. This collaboration signifies a milestone in the intersection of wellness and cultural narrative, elevating African-owned businesses as leaders in innovative products. The launch took place in New York on May 30, 2025.
news.headline: Idris and Sabrina Elba debut "No Lip Service" album by S'ABLE Labs, blending black identity into music and beauty. On Spotify. NYC, May 30, 2025.

news.summary: Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. announced its financial and operational results for Q1 2025, with key highlights including: completion of construction efforts for the Empower Calgary Facility, commissioning of the facility's asphalt shingle reprocessing, and progress on plant expansions in Hamilton, Ontario, and Delta, British Columbia. The Company also secured funding agreements totaling $3.9 million from Emissions Reduction Alberta and $617 thousand under a Business Development Bank loan facility, with a total of $248 thousand received during the quarter. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Northstar Clean Technologies Inc. reports Q1 2025 highlights: completed Empower Calgary Facility, Expansions in Hamilton & Delta, received $3.9M funding.

news.summary: Prominent researchers and industry specialists are harnessing high-throughput proteomics to achieve advancements in population health, translational research, and clinical development. This initiative involves leading experts in the field and aims to drive progress in these areas using cutting-edge proteomic technologies. Through this approach, significant breakthroughs are expected to emerge, furthering the understanding and improvement of public health on a large scale.
news.headline: Standard BioTools will host a "Proteomics Roundtable" webcast series with top researchers and experts using high-throughput proteomics for breakthroughs in population health, translational research, and clinical development.

news.summary: Over the course of the last 4 years, Dr. Raza Bokhari, the former CEO of the company, has paid a total of $2.35 million in non-dilutive cash. This payment was made to cover legal expenses and other costs that were determined in an arbitral award.
news.headline: Quantum BioPharma settles with Dr. Raza Bokhari, receiving $2.35 million; Bokhari pays in non-dilutive cash for past 4 years' legal costs.

news.summary: Chagee Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: CHA), a prominent premium tea drinks brand in Shanghai, disclosed its unaudited financial results for the quarter concluded on March 31, 2025. The company reported its success in offering freshly-made tea drinks that are both healthy and delicious.
news.headline: Chagee Holdings (NASDAQ: CHA) reveals unaudited Q1 2025 financial results in Shanghai, May 30.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Instil Bio, Inc. (Nasdaq: TIL) disclosed that Bronson Crouch, the CEO, is scheduled to speak at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 5, 2025, at 4:20PM ET. Instil, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, focuses on creating innovative therapies. For those interested, a live webcast of the event can be accessed via the following link: https://wsw.com/webcast/jeff319/til/1708376.
news.headline: Instil Bio's CEO will present at Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 5, 2025, at 4:20 PM ET. Livestream available.

news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland on May 30, 2025, Cartesian Therapeutics, Inc. initiated the Phase 3 AURORA trial of Descartes-08 for patients with myasthenia gravis. The company, listed as NASDAQ: RNAC, focuses on cell therapy for autoimmune diseases. The enrollment of the first participant marks a significant milestone in the trial's progress. This trial aims to evaluate the effectiveness of Descartes-08 in treating MG, a condition affecting an estimated number of X patients globally.
news.headline: Cartesian Therapeutics enrolls first participant in Phase 3 AURORA trial of Descartes-08 for myasthenia gravis.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Arvinas, Inc., a biotechnology company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ARVN, shared plans of their involvement at the Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference. The company, based in New Haven, Conn., is in the clinical stage of development and focuses on creating innovative drugs through targeted protein degradation. Management from Arvinas will take part in a fireside chat during the event, scheduled for June 5 at 2:35 p.m. Eastern Time, in New York City. This move signifies their endeavor to engage with the global healthcare community and potentially showcase their advancements in this field.
news.headline: Arvinas (Nasdaq: ARVN) to present at Jefferies Global Healthcare Conference on June 5 at 2:35 pm in NYC.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, G-III Apparel Group, Ltd. (NASDAQ: GIII), a prominent fashion company known for its design, sourcing, and marketing capabilities, disclosed plans to unveil its first quarter fiscal 2026 financial results prior to the market opening on Friday, June 6, 2025. The management team is set to conduct a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time on the same day to deliberate on the outcomes, with a subsequent session for the investment sector to ask questions.
news.headline: G-III Apparel Group to reveal Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings on June 6, 2025, before market opens with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET.

news.summary: Recent data presented at the 14th C1-inhibitor Deficiency & Angioedema Workshop advocates for the utilization of berotralstat across all age groups. This new information highlights the efficacy of berotralstat in managing the condition throughout various life stages. The findings suggest that berotralstat can be beneficial for individuals of all ages who are dealing with C1-inhibitor deficiency and angioedema. This data underscores the importance of considering berotralstat as a viable treatment option for patients across different age brackets.
news.headline: ORLADEYO reduces HAE attacks in all ages as per new data at 14th C1-inhibitor Deficiency & Angioedema Workshop.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. (TSX: BDGI; OTCQX: BDGIF), the primary non-destructive excavating and services provider in North America, has met the requirements to trade on the OTCQX ® Best Market. OTC Markets Group Inc., managing regulated markets for trading 12,000 U.S. and international securities, announced the transition of Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. from the Pink ® market to OTCQX.
news.headline: OTC Markets Group welcomes Badger Infrastructure Solutions Ltd. to OTCQX, North America's largest provider of non-destructive excavating services; traded on OTCQX from Pink market.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, PLBY Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: PLBY), a prominent pleasure and leisure lifestyle corporation and owner of Playboy, a globally well-known brand, stated that it would join the Russell Microcap® Index after the 2025 Russell U.S. Indexes yearly reconstitution. This move will take place starting June 30, 2025, signaling the company's increasing presence in the market.
news.headline: PLBY Group chosen for Russell Microcap® Index inclusion, effective June 30, 2025.

news.headline: Amicus Therapeutics (Nasdaq: FOLD) to present at investor conferences in June 2025, as announced on May 30.

news.summary: Fort Worth, Texas – On May 30, 2025, Range Resources Corporation (NYSE: RRC) revealed that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend for the second quarter. The dividend amounts to $0.09 per common share and will be disbursed on June 27, 2025. Stockholders as of June 13, 2025, will be eligible to receive this dividend.
news.headline: Range Resources Corporation declares quarterly dividend of $0.09 per common share, payable on June 27, 2025.

The company is dedicated to creating and selling imaging technologies that aid in various minimally invasive cardiovascular procedures.
news.headline: Conavi Medical reports Q2 2025 results for quarter ended March 31, 2025. Stock symbol: TSXV: CNVI, OTCQB: CNVIF.

This strategic move is set to significantly boost Refresco’s production capacity and market presence in the region. Telemark Kildevann is known for its high-quality beverages and strong customer base, making it an attractive target for acquisition. This deal is valued at [insert amount] and is expected to be finalized by [insert date]. The acquisition underscores Refresco’s commitment to expanding its global footprint and offering a diverse range of beverage products to consumers worldwide.

news.summary: In ROSH-HA`AYIN, Israel, on May 30, 2025, Kornit Digital Ltd. revealed that Ronen Samuel, its CEO, and Jared Maymon, the Global Head of Investor Relations & Strategic Finance, will be part of a webcasted presentation at the William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference. Kornit, traded as Nasdaq: KRNT, is a renowned global leader specializing in sustainable digital fashion and textile production technologies. This announcement signifies the Company's active engagement in the upcoming event.
news.headline: Kornit Digital to attend William Blair 45th Annual Growth Stock Conference with CEO and IR sharing insights.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Mosaic, a top provider of deal model automation solutions for private equity firms, revealed its entry into the investment banking sector. This move involves a strategic partnership with Evercore, a leading global independent investment bank. Through this collaboration, Mosaic aims to broaden its platform and cater to a wider client base in the financial industry.
news.headline: Mosaic expands into investment banking with Evercore partnership, boosting deal model automation.

news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, it has been reported that the automotive radar market is anticipated to grow significantly, with projections indicating it will reach a value of USD 22.83 billion by 2032. This marks a substantial increase from its value of USD 5.36 billion in 2025, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 23.0% during the period of 2025 to 2032. These insights were shared in a recent report published by MarketsandMarkets. The surge in the automotive radar market is attributed to various factors, including...
news.headline: Automotive radar market to reach $22.83 billion by 2032 from $5.36 billion in 2025, growing at CAGR of 23.0%.

news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, Champion Homes, Inc. (NYSE: SKY) disclosed that the company's Board of Directors has approved a boost of $50 million to its ongoing share buyback initiative, raising the total program capacity to $150 million. Tim Larson, the President and CEO, expressed confidence in their strategy and highlighted robust cash flow generation. The company is dedicated to providing solid financial performance.
news.headline: Champion Homes increases share repurchase program by $50 million to $150 million, citing confidence in strategy and strong cash generation.

news.summary: Altair, a renowned leader in computational intelligence, has recently received acknowledgement for both its comprehensive vision and strong execution capabilities. In a recent report, Altair's data analytics and AI platform, Altair® RapidMiner®, was recognized as a Leader by Gartner, a prominent research and advisory company. This recognition highlights Altair's position in the industry, emphasizing its ability to innovate and deliver high-quality solutions. The announcement was made on May 30, 2025, by Altair, which is based in TROY, Mich. This underscores the company's significance within the global market.
news.headline: Altair recognized as leader in data science and ML platforms for 2nd consecutive year by Gartner in June 2025 report.
